name: aifinetuner
description: AI Fine-Tuner — interactive HTML fine-tuning GUIs with sliders, infinite canvas, and pixel-faithful live preview of your real element.

plugins.name: ai-fine-tuner
plugins.description: Generate interactive HTML fine-tuning GUIs with real-time sliders, infinite canvas preview, and authentic live reproduction of your actual element. Teaches any AI coding agent to produce a single-file tuning interface — for existing elements or newly built ones — instead of iterating on values in chat. Proactively suggests itself when the agent detects iteration or vague visual feedback.
